channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: khalid.se
item.description:
Welcome to my personal home on the web.

I am a IT and security manager at an international NGO in Sweden, and this is where I publish my presentations of intrest, my contact information and do some crazy stuff behind the scenes.

Work of interest

  • 👁️‍🗨️ Surveillance based ads, and their impact on society (in Swedish).
  • ✊🏽 Cybersecurity for activists, a seminar covering Cybersecurity basics.
  • 🏳️‍🌈 Oppressed Pride , master thesis in Social Work.
